entity.summary: Mantle-based decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol with substantial historical trading volume and remaining liquidity, but no recent fee activity in the reviewed current metrics.
entity.notes: Cleo, Cleopatra CL, and Cleopatra Legacy candidate rows are represented under this parent identity. Classified inactive rather than dead because TVL remains and no terminal shutdown notice was recovered.

evidence.title: Cleopatra CL protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies the Mantle AMM, reports remaining TVL and substantial cumulative DEX volume, while recent fee windows were zero in the reviewed snapshot.

evidence.title: Cleopatra DEX official social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the protocol directory and used to corroborate the Cleopatra parent identity.
